structural_claim: Fundamental properties of nature cannot be predetermined independently of the context in which they are observed

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Quantum observables cannot possess predetermined values independent of measurement context
The strong coupling constant's value depends fundamentally on the energy scale at which it is probed

supporting_results.result_name: Measurement of the strong coupling constant
supporting_results.structural_conclusion: The strong force is characterized by a running coupling that changes with energy scale
